asset.title: Ask Spreadsheet Cas
asset.purpose: Silent workflow preview generated from app captures or trace replays. Judge whether it communicates the workflow and gate clearly.

judge.summary: The workflow preview demonstrates an agent interacting with a spreadsheet, locking cells, and communicating in public and private chats. The flow is visible but fast-paced.

featureClarity.evidence: Shows spreadsheet cell updates, agent locking states, and chat logs, though the multi-panel layout requires close attention.

workflowCompleteness.evidence: Captures the transition from public chat request to spreadsheet locking and private agent response.

visualDesign.evidence: Dark mode UI is structured, but the dense layout with multiple active panels feels slightly crowded.

consistency.evidence: Aligns with the NodeRoom paradigm of spreadsheets, public/private chats, and room traces.

evidenceQuality.evidence: Appears to be a direct capture of the application interface during an execution trace.

legibility.evidence: Text in the chat panels and spreadsheet cells is readable at standard resolution, though small.

professionalRelevance.evidence: Demonstrates financial spreadsheet auditing and multi-agent collaboration, highly relevant to business users.

productionHonesty.evidence: Shows real-time UI state changes, locking banners, and trace logs without simulated overlays.

observedEvidence: Public chat log with Room NodeAgent
Private chat log with Your NodeAgent
Room trace logs at the bottom of the screen

defects.observed: The transition to the private chat panel on the right happens abruptly, making it easy to miss the context shift.
defects.fix: Add a brief pause or visual transition indicator when the private chat panel updates.

judge.suggestedReadmeCaption: Watch NodeAgent lock variance columns, update spreadsheet values, and coordinate across public and private channels.
